name: Post-Call Follow-up
description: After logging a call or meeting, creates a follow-up task in 2 days to check on next steps.
descriptionAr: بعد تسجيل مكالمة أو اجتماع، ينشئ مهمة متابعة بعد يومين للاطمئنان على الخطوات التالية.

config.title: Follow up after {{type}}: {{contact.name}}
config.description: A {{type}} was logged. Follow up on discussed items and confirm next steps.
